report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.comment: Why don't we try to make this light mode instead of dark mode @Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: Flipping the landing page from dark to light mode is a visual-direction call that needs design judgment, not a single mechanical swap.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: The comment gives no action or target beyond 'this one too', with no prior thread context to resolve what it refers to.
report.reply: Not sure what you meant by 'this one too' here — could you point me to the specific element or change you're referencing? Happy to action it once I know what 'this' is.
